symbolicVertexFamilyLemma.statement: If outsider ≡ 3 (mod 4) and vertex ≡ 1 (mod 4), then outsider * vertex + 1 ≡ 0 (mod 4).
symbolicVertexFamilyLemma.proofBoundary: This proves the square-residue vertex-presence family for this successor condition only; sibling conditions still need their own family lemmas.

theoremObligation.statement: Under outP2=99|out25=6|smaller=side18|out4=3, stabilize the 142 literal vertex-presence atoms whose first square witness is 4.
theoremObligation.proofBoundary: This successor packet stabilizes one vertex-presence subfamily only; it is not a full split lemma until the sibling refinement conditions and matching/edge obligations are promoted too.

nextTheoremActions: Promote this square-residue successor into a symbolic vertex-family lemma.
After this condition is proved, attack the next sibling square-residue successor condition.
